description: Create a two-column content slide on expectations for technology in 2024 in historical context, with explanatory text on the left and a table of global average agree percentages by year on the right.

header.headline: Expectations for technology in 2024 in an historical context

left.body: Please indicate if you agree very much, agree somewhat, disagree somewhat or disagree very much with the following statements...?

rows: Many more people will live their lives in virtual worlds
Robots will look like, think like and speak like humans
Strict rules for large technology companies will be introduced by the Government in [COUNTRY]
Self-driving cars will become a usual sight on the streets of my town/city

footer.source: Global averages - % agree. Base: 23,721 adults aged 18 years and older in India, 18-74 in Canada, Republic of Ireland, Malaysia, the Philippines, South Africa, Turkey, and the United States, 20-74 in Thailand, 21-74 in Indonesia and Singapore, and 16-74 in all other countries. Friday, October 25 – Friday November 8, 2024. © Ipsos Predictions 2025 Report
